limitations: AI investment intensity: No dollar amounts or quantified AI-specific capex are disclosed in the excerpts; the multi-year capex table references data center load growth and technology broadly but does not isolate AI spend.

AI narrative concreteness: AI is mentioned primarily in the context of cybersecurity threat vectors (adversarial AI use), not as a deployed internal capability; no named AI initiatives or production deployments are described.

AI risk disclosure: Risk sections are present and do name AI as a cybersecurity threat vector and data center demand driver, but mechanisms are described at a category level rather than with quantified scenarios or named governance bodies, limiting score to 3.
